_comment: Default values for AdaptStance. All lengths in mm, angles in degrees.

references.source: Ergonomic references based on SAE J1516, EN ISO 15534-1, and motorcycle-specific ergonomics literature.
notes: Back angle is measured from vertical (0° = fully upright).
All other joint angles are interior (included) angles at the joint.
Segment lengths represent the 50th-percentile adult; scale proportionally for other percentiles.
Cruiser typical: upright torso, feet forward, high bars.
Sport typical: forward lean 35–60°, knees tucked, low/forward bars.
